review_title: Great DIY website platform for individuals or small agencies
description: Been a duda user for years and have built many websites on this platform. Very easy to use.
author: Alexis M.
pros: Duda makes it incredibly easy to build a really well-designed website. Mobile responsiveness is baked right in however you can also edit the site for different device screens individually. Lots of features and pre-built templates/sections to make it easy. Drag and drop editor is simple to use.
cons: As a basic website user, Duda has all I need and more. If you are looking for super advanced editing capabilities and SEO features, it may not have everything you need.

review_title: Duda or Du Not?
description: Duda is great to get a website launched, but it lacks certain features that some might be looking for. For my use case, Duda was perfect to get a landing page up and running in no time. Power users may feel frustrated by Duda.
author: Andrew A.
pros: Duda is extremely easy to use and figure out with its drag and drop functionality. The ready-made templates make it easy to launch a good-looking website in a short timespan. Their 2-week free trial is very generous and allows you the chance to see if it would work for you.
cons: Duda lacks some functionality and is not mobile-first in its design. Sometimes when trying to tweak spacing, it will glitch and not look as planned once published or will revert to a previous setting. Additionally, when wanting to integrate Duda with Zapier, it required an upgrade beyond the basic plan which was surprising and unfortunate.

review_title: Not working in over a month
description: I would like to leave indformation about my experience with Duda Mobile Software. I purchased the lifetime membership a few months ago so I could have my site on both IPhone and Android. I spent over a week setting up the sites on both mobile devices. After I was finished I published them and thought all was ok. This was back over a month ago. I checked out my Android version of the site on my Samsung Edhe Plus and the site wasn't working. I reported this to the Duda Support team . Mind you, this was over a month ago. thing. It's a long process and they will call me when it's fixed. Well it's been over a month and nothing else has happened . I have told the company that I will be writing a review about was has happened to me. I have an IPhone and and Andeoid phone . The IPhone works just fine on my new mobile site. I have told Duda more than once that if you depress one of the other buttons on my Android site labeled " our hours or "about us" then the site works ok. I have received no response from them on this information . I will update this post as I receive information from Duda Thank you reading this Sincerely, Frederic F

author_profession: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My Overall Experience with Duda
description: Even though I don’t use Duda on a daily basis, it is the best alternative that you can ever get for WordPress - the way it simplify web design through allocation of built-in CSS templates is the main benefit so far.
author: Purvesh S.
pros: It has been nearly three years since I implemented Duda. The availability of drag-and-drop editor functionality is what I like most since it requires zero coding to create and design websites with Duda.
cons: I use Duda as a WordPress alternative and I barely come across bugs whenever I turn to it to create and design blogs and websites.

review_title: Duda #1 CMS Editor
description: I rate Duda 5 Stars, because it is not like Wordpress an open source makedsDuda.co, #1 professional website builder, offers several advantages for both businesses and web professionals. The CMS part of Duda.co is easy to use and suitable for medium-sized websites with relatively simple content. The website builder is ideal for creating responsive websites quickly and efficiently and offers advanced features for control over design and functionality.
author: Niek J.
pros: Duda websites are based in cloud and are the safest and fastest on mobile on mobile devices. All Duda website have an overall minmal Google rating of 70
cons: The complexity of the CMS editor is higher than others but after 8 year with Duda I can’t find that a big issue.

review_title: Best Software for Digital Media Agencies
description: I have enjoyed every part of it and geek out talking about it to clients or friends.
author: Livvy N.
pros: I love everything about it, it can be a very simple platform that you can give it to your customers for drag and drop and as complicated as completely hard code the website for it to do whatever you want. Saves on time, loads faster, love the load balancing aspect of it. Takes out so many things that I used to worry about building it in a Wordpress, PHP environment.
cons: I have not run into it yet. Even though there might be some, the team has been very efficient to handle them .

review_title: Modern, easy to use drag n drop builder
description: Overall I am enjoying my experience with Duda, building modern and responsive and good-looking websites has never been easier - or quicker.
author: Lois O.
pros: I am using it under the Whitelabel Snapps.ai. What I like most about it is how easy it is to use - it's a website builder for idiots. Also, in comparison to Weebly, it is an absolute dream in terms of speed and customisability. I also appreciate the inbuilt SEO.
cons: I least like the pricing with Snapps - compared to its counterparts, it is quite expensive. Especially if you have an agency where you own multiple websites, the costs can add up quite quickly, whereas if you built the same sites on something like WP it is essentially free.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Website and Landing Pages Builder
description: Websites, blogs and landing pages all have been easy to create with Duda which requires zero coding.
author: Felicia S.
pros: I like it that now I am able to create premium websites with Duda and it requires zero coding as I use drag and drop functionality.
cons: Even though Duda has poor SEO tools, this isn’t an issue on my end since I have integrated with external e-commerce tools that help boost the ranking of my Telecommunications brand across search engines.

review_title: Duda Pleasing my Leisure Projects
author: Michele M.
pros: I have been able to create websites, landing pages and professional resumes without coding with the help of Duda - this will ever be my favorite aspect.
cons: I mainly to use Duda as a tool for leisure since I like creative projects and I hardly come in contact with drawbacks.

review_title: Duda is a Remarkable Tool for Website Creation and Design
description: Designing graphics for my photography website has been at optimal and breeze with the help of Duda as well as improving the SEO ranking across all search engines.
author: Adolphus O.
pros: Duda is a remarkable tool which I use to create and design highly responsive and stunning websites without coding through drag and drop functionality.
cons: Unfortunately, domain search and registration is a bit pricey but I purchase from other providers and point to Duda via changing DNS.

review_title: Duda Insight Reviewed on 1️⃣st October 2️⃣0️⃣2️⃣4️⃣
author: Paulinus U.
pros: I use Duda as Squarespace alternative to design websites and create landing pages. It requires zero coding to design websites with the help of drag and drop functionality.
cons: I find nothing to outline as a flaw since Duda accomplish all my needs whenever I turn to it.

review_title: Duda: Website Design Platform of this Era
author: Dilak S.
pros: Duda for over three now has been the most robust Squarespace alternative. It allows me to create and design websites easily via drag and drop functionality.
cons: It host few websites across all the plans compared to alternatives such as Hostgator.

review_title: Duda: The Perfect Website Builder for Agencies and Freelancers Alike
description: Overall, Duda is a fantastic website builder that provides a wide range of customization and design features. Anyone, even those with little to no coding experience, can easily create a website that looks professional thanks to its user-friendly drag-and-drop interface. The platform also provides a number of useful tools for businesses and independent contractors, like the capacity to store and distribute team-approved designs as templates. For users with at least a Team subscription, Duda provides a comprehensive knowledge base, email support, live chat support, and phone support. In our experience, Duda's customer service is consistently responsive and helpful. Despite having plans that start at $14 per month when paid annually, Duda's pricing may be on the high side for some users. However, the caliber of the product and the variety of features it offers may make up for this. Additionally, Duda gives users access to some of the best security, speed, and storage specialists in the world, ensuring that their websites will function normally even in the event of technical difficulties. All things considered, we heartily endorse Duda as a website builder for those looking to create a polished, expert-looking website without having to have extensive coding knowledge.
author: Emil L.
pros: In terms of pros, Duda offers a variety of useful features for freelancers and agencies, including a wealth of design options and the capacity to quickly and easily build and customize a website. The platform also boasts top-notch security, storage, and speed experts who guarantee that users' websites will be up and running normally despite technical difficulties. Additionally, users can be reassured that other well-known brands are probably dealing with the same problem if their website crashes while using Duda, meaning that it will probably be fixed quickly. The only possible drawback to using Duda is that it has slightly higher prices than some rivals. However, this seems like a fair price to pay given the product's quality and the variety of features it offers.
cons: A number of design features are available through the well-liked website builder Duda, but it also has some significant drawbacks that users should be aware of before choosing a plan. First off, the monthly cost for the cheapest plan with Duda is $14 when paid for annually, which is on the pricey side. For those with limited resources or those just beginning their online presence, this may be a steep price to pay. Furthermore, Duda does not provide a free plan, which could be a con for users who are unsure of whether the platform is right for them. Another drawback of using Duda is that it might not provide as many robust website features as other builders. For instance, despite having a large selection of design options, it might not offer as many sophisticated Search Engine Optimization (SEO) options as some of its rivals. This could be a drawback for those trying to raise their search engine rankings and increase traffic to their website. Last but not least, some users have complained that Duda can be cumbersome and challenging to use when trying to customize their templates beyond what is possible. For those seeking complete creative freedom in their website design, this can be frustrating.

review_title: Has bridged the gap for our agency
description: Overall, really really good. It's saved us from hiring a full time developer. Hope my review does not sound negative, this is just some constructive criticism.
author: Adam S.
pros: We were about to hire a full stack developer, no need for now, we just outsource any complex bits of code to another company Websites nice and fast to build, reducing our quotes to clients, or increasing profit margin, though sometimes can be restrictive and we are unable to do exactly as our design suggests. Fairly easy to use interface.
cons: Some controls not very intuitive Often hard to get things where you want on the page without disturbing Frustrating that elements can't be 'locked' between resolutions, the build process would be so much faster if we weren't switching back between devices getting things just right, or recreating rows because we could not find a compromise. Some menu's appear slightly offscreen depending on where they are, this can be frustrating Sometimes buttons overlap and it's impossible to select the area you need without copying and pasting the row to alleviate this problem Sometimes we're unable to move pages around properly (they would not go where dropped), by duplicating the page we were able to place the duplicate in the right place. We've had an issue where hex codes are identical between rows, though they are not seamless and there appears to be a slight variation in colour between them both (you can see where they join). Or client noticed this and there was nothing we could do. As a paying customer I don't thing email-only support is enough, we have a couple of websites on Duda already and it can be frustrating having to wait for an email reply, especially when it goes back and forth when a phone call would make this much faster. We have had to inform both clients sites we're producing on Duda there will be a delay while we wait for a response from Duda support, to which they reply 'just call them!' Widgets library still pretty small, though I expect this will grow over time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Outstanding Platform and Excellent Customer Support
description: A stunning, useful website may be created without any coding knowledge on duda. Additionally, the sites are technically sound from an SEO standpoint, which reduces a lot of work and hassles when it comes to optimizing your website for search engines.Basically, we use Duda ro create amazing websites within a short period of time for our clients and personal businesses as well.
author: Ade A.
pros: I discovered Duda while working with a small Branding and Marketing company. We use duda for the web development jobs and the results have been excellent. The interface is also very cool and easy to useOn duda, Making templates that can be used again is really simple. Additionally, you may develop parts that can be utilized on any website or template that already exists. They also offer a ton of pre-made sections that are often updated. This makes creating new websites simple! I can design a small 5-page website within a few of hours! Managing clients is likewise very simple and is done on a single page. Our customers also appreciate how easy it is for them to update the website themselves using the backend.
cons: I wish you could copy and paste content from one website to another. Additionally, I would like the option to choose whether the desktop design should be responsive on tablets and mobile devices.

review_title: I'm not the best at design or coding, but Duda makes it so easy..
description: I'm truly thankful that I found Duda.I was struggling to find the right business model at the beginning of my web design journey that would provide reoccurring revenue, and Duda's helped me shape my business into what it is today.I'm not the best at design or coding, but Duda makes it so easy to create great websites. I've been able to create sites for businesses and individuals and charge monthly for my services.Not only does it allow me to make a residual income, but it also allows me to travel the world doing the Digital Nomad thing and work from anywhere I want.It's truly been a life-changing experience and I'm grateful for everything that Duda's done for me, and knowing in the background their platform just works.
author: Robert T.
pros: Rapidly create websites at speed with Duda's simple to use CRM for agencies.
cons: A few of there Widgets are a little outdated and need some attention.

review_title: My Experience With Duda
author: Finan C.
pros: When it comes to handling web content, Duda offers best features. It makes designing websites easy and integration is easy too. In addition, it makes it easy to secure websites thanks t the SSL security capabilities. In a nutshell, with Duda, content management is easyb
cons: No specific issues with Duda. It meets the need and fits the bill.

review_title: Duda has the goods and it has the bads. Agencies may like it; photographers & e-com stores won't
description: My experience has been iffy. Duda offers a lot of really great options and support, but it's not for everyone, including us. It's simply not robust enough, nor does it meet the needs of our target market - creatives.
author: Dana R.
pros: Duda is an incredibly easy platform to use. Everything is one place, labeled appropriately and easy to find. It's streamlined, simple and easy to use for beginners and more advanced users alike. And the ability to white-label Duda for agencies is definitely a hot ticket option, for sure.
cons: Blogging isn't as robust as what you'd hope, especially with other services like Wordpress and Squarespace. But Duda holds it's own in other aspects so it's not a total deal breaker. It's also not ideal for photographers, in my opinion. There's just not enough customization when it comes to images and galleries. E-commerce is lacking as well. They integrate with Ecwid (if I wanted to use Ecwid, I would, but I personally don't like them). Duda needs to create its own integrated service without having to rely on an outside source.

review_title: Duda is all I use now!
description: Per my previous comments, I am building high-quality sites in less time. This benefits my clients and also helps to grow my business.
author: William H.
pros: I like the ease of use. I believe it allows me to build great sites with excellent functionality in a lot less time than the tools I formerly used. This allows me to provide a more affordable service to my clients. As a 5-year White Label partner I get grade person to person support whenever I call with an issue or problem. In short, I am fully sold on the Duda product.
cons: The first few years that I used the Duda product I encountered fairly frequent bugs and frustrations with things that either didn't work as expected or unavailable capabilities that I needed. In the past several years, however, the product has evolved to the point where I rarely encounter such issues.

review_title: This has it all
description: We build and maintain websites for clients around the globe... no better product to deliver a high quality solution.
author: Bob S.
pros: Duda is simple and easy to use - makes great looking sites and has all the bells and whistles you need to build a website, get found and make money. No need to worry about widget updates here - Duda takes care of it all. SEO is a breeze and all our sites are at the top of Google. Customer service is the best - never leaves you stuck. SSL certs are free - everyone else is still charging $50-$75 year... Face it, this is a MOBILE world and if you are not working in a mobile friendly builder, you will lose... Duda is a No Brainer!
cons: Would like more apps integrated into the platform. Would like to have email included in the hosting.

review_title: DUDA converts your site into a mobile version if it's not already
description: Your current site in mobile format in a quick and easy fashion.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: A really handy tool if you're worried about being penalised for not having a mobile friendly site which is quick, effective and not overly expensive.
cons: The design is limited - so whilst a mobile version will be possible it might not look as aesthetically pleasing as you'd like.

review_title: Easy Website Creator for All Levels
description: Duda is very cost effective solution for getting websites built and launched very quickly. The simplicity of the platform interface means you don't need a developer to build sites with Duda unless you want something very customized.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The Duda platform is an easy to use drag and drop type builder for responsive websites. The interface and controls don't require much learning to get comfortable with. The platform has a large variety widgets to cover most website functionality and has very user friendly settings for basic SEO info, Google Analytics linking and most of the other website essentials. The biggest strength of the platform is the dozens of ready-to-customize templates that the platform comes loaded with. With these you can publish your new website in a very short time.
cons: With Duda your site is built and hosted on their proprietary platform. Since it's not based on any other popular CRM like WordPress this means that if you ever want to move your site it will not be an easy switch over. Duda does offer a site export function that captures most of the content on the site as HTML & CSS files but it doesn't include any blog data.

review_title: Excellent product!
description: Our overall experience with Duda has been amazing. It is a great product and a great value for the price. We will continue to use it in the future!
author: John S.
pros: This software is extremely easy to use and very intuitive. We had our first website up and running in minutes! The offering of widgets, templates and sections makes it very easy to create a stunning responsive website. Customer service is very knowledgeable and good at pinpointing the issue for quick resolution.
cons: I would like to see more integration with different social platforms such as Pinterest, Instagram and Google My Business.

review_title: Duda is a Dud
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I use this software for the mobile version of my website. It is clunky, hard to use, and not user friendly. Features are hard to learn, and very limited.
cons: I think google might not like this software because since I started using it my traffic has steadily declined for my website. The customer service is terrible. The software is hard to understand, and if you make certain errors, like putting adsense on wrong, you need to delete everything and start all over again to get your website to function properly.

review_title: Web designing looks easy with Duda
description: Duda can be used by everyone but it has great scope for freelancers and web designers to create easy tools and logos in real quick.
author: MEHROSE S.
pros: Amazing range of applications and widgets for you to add and even create your own customized applications. Too easy to generate tools to work with and make the website looks mesmerizing.
cons: I have no issues with Duda as I love working with Duda but the only thing that makes me sad is pricing which is too high and no free plans for beginners to get entertain.
